BlackRock, Nasdaq seek SEC approval to add staking to BlackRock’s spot Ether ETF
articles.description: Nasdaq has proposed a rule change with the SEC to enable staking capabilities for BlackRock's spot Ethereum ETF, the iShares Ethereum Trust, also known as ETHA. According to a new 19b-4 filing, the fund would be able to stake all or a portion of ETHA's Ether through one or more trusted staking providers if granted approval by the securities regulator. The proposal also indicates that staking rewards would be treated as income. With this move, BlackRock officially joins a number of fund managers

articles.title: Infini Hacker Launders Additional Ethereum Through Tornado Cash
articles.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the Infini hacker has further laundered 3,000 ETH using Tornado Cash, in addition to previously converting 1,770 ETH into approximately 5. 9 million DAI. Earlier this year, in February, the Infini platform, a stablecoin digital bank, suffered an attack resulting in a loss of approximately $49. 5 million.

articles.title: Major Ethereum Whales Sell Off Amid Buying Trend
articles.description: According to BlockBeats, recent monitoring by Lookonchain reveals that despite a trend of many whales purchasing Ethereum (ETH), two significant whales have sold a total of 178,080 ETH, valued at approximately $528 million. Trend Research acquired 184,115 ETH at an average price of $2,118 per unit between February 26 and June 20, totaling $390 million.
